description: Create a V-shaped oil containment boom scenario in Bridge Command to protect Southampton Water within the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/q) Oil Recovery V-Sweep/'. The scenario must use the Solent location with overcast skies, 2nm visibility, and calm seas. Position a Recovery Vessel (Type=Coaster or Tug) at the Collection Point (50.8350°N, 1.3050°W) and deploy two arms of red buoys (Type=Buoy_R) converging on that point. The West Arm begins at 50.8250°N, 1.3150°W and the East Arm begins at 50.8250°N, 1.2950°W, with buoys placed at exactly 0.002 degree intervals of Latitude along the paths connecting the start points to the Collection Point. Document the required heading for each arm and the total number of buoys used in '/home/ga/Documents/boom_deployment_plan.txt'.
